languageSwitcher.title: Hitamo ururimi
languageSwitcher.subtitle: Hindura ururimi rwa porogaramu. Ibisobanuro byuzuzwa kuri buri rurimi.

header.subtitle: Shaka akazi, winjize amafaranga kandi utere imbere na Akazek.

location.title: Aho uherereye
location.subtitle: Bikoreshwa mu kukwereka serivisi ziri hafi no gufasha abakiriya kukubona.

onboarding.tagline: Uburyo bwizewe bwo kubona serivisi z'urugo.
onboarding.changeLater: Ushobora guhindura ibi igihe icyo ari cyo cyose.

employer.title: Shaka abakozi bizewe
employer.desc: Shaka kandi uhe akazi abakozi bizewe ku rugo n'umuryango wawe.

worker.title: Nshaka akazi
worker.desc: Tanga serivisi zawe, ushake akazi kandi winjize amafaranga.

business.title: Mpagarariye ubucuruzi
business.desc: Andikisha ikigo cyawe maze uhuze n'abakiriya benshi.

onboarding.secureNote: Amakuru yawe arafite umutekano kandi ni ibanga
